signature_wines.name: Barca Velha
signature_wines.tasting_notes: Portugal's most iconic dry red, made only in exceptional years from Douro Superior fruit: a structured, ageworthy wine with cedar, tobacco and a long mineral finish. Source: producer and Wine Advocate 97 points 2011 vintage.
signature_wines.description: Barca Velha, Portugal's most iconic dry red, made by Ferreira only in exceptional Douro Superior vintages. DOC Douro, from the Douro Valley of northern Portugal.

signature_wines.name: Quinta do Noval Nacional
signature_wines.tasting_notes: One of the rarest and most legendary wines in the world, from a tiny block of ungrafted, pre-phylloxera vines, declared only in exceptional years and capable of ageing for generations. Source: producer and Wine Advocate 100 points 2011 vintage.
signature_wines.description: Quinta do Noval Nacional, from a tiny block of ungrafted pre-phylloxera vines, one of the rarest and most legendary Ports in the world.

signature_wines.name: Quinta do Vale Meao Tinto
signature_wines.tasting_notes: One of Portugal's most sought-after dry reds, from the historic Douro Superior estate where Barca Velha was born: powerful yet refined, with cedar, graphite and a long structured finish. Source: producer and Wine Advocate 96 points 2017 vintage.
signature_wines.description: Quinta do Vale Meao Tinto, one of Portugal's most sought-after dry reds, from the historic estate where Barca Velha was born. Best enjoyed 8 to 30 from vintage.

signature_wines.name: Taylor's Vintage Port
signature_wines.tasting_notes: Taylor's declared Vintage is the firm, structured benchmark of the style: dense black-fruit concentration over grippy tannins built for decades in bottle. Source: producer and Wine Advocate 98 points 2016 vintage.
signature_wines.description: Taylor's declared Vintage Port, the firm and long-lived classic benchmark from the Fladgate house, built around the Vargellas estate.

signature_wines.name: Dow's Vintage Port
signature_wines.tasting_notes: The driest of the classic Vintage Ports, built around Quinta do Bomfim and Senhora da Ribeira fruit, with a firm structure and a notably dry, savoury finish. Source: producer and Wine Spectator 98 points 2016 vintage.
signature_wines.description: Dow's Vintage Port, the driest of the classic Vintages, built around Quinta do Bomfim with a firm savoury finish. Best enjoyed 20 to 50 from vintage.

signature_wines.name: Graham's Vintage Port
signature_wines.tasting_notes: The richest and sweetest of the classic Vintage Ports, built on the warm Malvedos and Tua fruit, with opulent black fruit over a firm spine. Source: producer and Wine Spectator 98 points 2017 vintage.
signature_wines.description: Graham's Vintage Port, the richest and sweetest of the classic Vintages, built on warm Malvedos fruit. DOC Porto, from the Douro Valley of northern Portugal.

signature_wines.name: Fonseca Vintage Port
signature_wines.tasting_notes: Fonseca's Vintage is the lush, exotically fruited counterpoint to Taylor's: opulent black fruit and a perfumed minty lift over firm structure. Source: producer and Wine Advocate 98 points 2017 vintage.
signature_wines.description: Fonseca Vintage Port, the lush exotically fruited classic of the Fladgate house, built around Quinta do Panascal. Best enjoyed 20 to 50 from vintage.

signature_wines.name: Quinta do Vesuvio Vintage Port
signature_wines.tasting_notes: A powerful single-quinta Vintage Port from the grand Douro Superior estate, foot-trodden in granite lagares, with dense black fruit and a mineral, ageworthy structure. Source: producer and Wine Advocate 97 points 2017 vintage.
signature_wines.description: Quinta do Vesuvio Vintage Port, a powerful single-quinta Vintage from the grand Douro Superior estate, foot-trodden in granite lagares.

signature_wines.name: Niepoort Batuta
signature_wines.tasting_notes: Niepoort's flagship old-vine Douro red, from very old field-blend vineyards: concentrated yet fresh, with graphite minerality and fine-grained structure for long ageing. Source: producer and Wine Advocate 95 points 2017 vintage.
signature_wines.description: Niepoort Batuta, the house's flagship old-vine Douro red, concentrated yet fresh with graphite minerality. DOC Douro, from the Douro Valley of northern Portugal.

signature_wines.name: Quinta do Crasto Vinha Maria Teresa
signature_wines.tasting_notes: A single-vineyard old-vine field blend from a plot of pre-1920 vines, dense and structured yet fresh, with graphite minerality and a long savoury finish built for the cellar. Source: producer and Wine Advocate 96 points 2017 vintage.
signature_wines.description: Quinta do Crasto Vinha Maria Teresa, a flagship single-vineyard old-vine field blend built for the cellar. DOC Douro, from the Douro Valley of northern Portugal.

signature_wines.name: Wine & Soul Pintas
signature_wines.tasting_notes: The wine that launched Wine & Soul, from a tiny plot of ancient field-blend vines at Vale de Mendiz: dense and mineral yet fresh, a benchmark of the modern Douro. Source: producer and Wine Advocate 95 points 2017 vintage.
signature_wines.description: Wine & Soul Pintas, the dense mineral old-vine field blend that launched the acclaimed Vale de Mendiz project. DOC Douro, from the Douro Valley of northern Portugal.

signature_wines.name: Chryseia
signature_wines.tasting_notes: A refined, Bordeaux-influenced Douro red from the Symington and Prats partnership: silky and polished, prizing elegance and freshness over power. Source: producer and Wine Advocate 95 points 2017 vintage.
signature_wines.description: Chryseia, a refined Bordeaux-influenced Douro red from the Symington and Prats partnership. DOC Douro, from the Douro Valley of northern Portugal.
